mapper.insert:
insert into leave_request
student_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, reason, status, create_time,
values
#{studentId}, #{leaveType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, '待审批', now(),
insert into leave_approval_log (leave_request_id, approver_id, result, comment, approve_time) values (#{id}, #{approverId}, #{result}, #{comment}, now())
mapper.select: select l.id, l.student_id, s.name as student_name, l.leave_type, l.start_time, l.end_time, l.reason, l.status, l.create_time, l.update_time, log.id as log_id, log.approver_id, log.approve_time, log.result as log_result, log.comment, t.name as approver_name from leave_request l left join student s on l.student_id = s.id left join leave_approval_log log on l.id = log.leave_request_id left join teacher t on log.approver_id = t.id where l.id = #{id}

select l.id, l.approver_id, t.name as approver_name, l.approve_time, l.result, l.comment from leave_approval_log l left join teacher t on l.approver_id = t.id
l.leave_request_id = #{leaveRequestId}
